heading.subtitle: A comprehensive financial management system with real-time market data, enterprise-grade security, and advanced charting.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.body: Toyota Finance Portal is a comprehensive financial management system designed for Toyota dealerships and financial services. This application provides secure authentication, real-time market data, and portfolio management capabilities.

protectedRoute.unauthorizedBody: You don't have permission to access this page.

notFound.title: The page you requested does not exist
notFound.body: It may have been moved, removed, or never existed.

chart.detailLockMessage: This page is locked to {{type}} / {{symbol}}.
chart.selectSymbol: Select a symbol to view chart data

sma.title: SMA 20 (Simple Moving Average)
sma.desc: 20-day average price. Short-term trend indicator. Price above SMA20 suggests uptrend.

ema.title: EMA 50 (Exponential Moving Average)
ema.desc: 50-day weighted average. Reacts faster to recent price changes than SMA.

tools.title: Drawing Tools
tools.desc: Use trend lines, Fibonacci retracements, and freehand drawings for custom analysis.

ASSET_CARDS.label: Asset cards
ASSET_CARDS.description: Live price board for the assets you pin

MOVERS.label: Gainers / Losers
MOVERS.description: Daily movement for the market you pick

widgetSettings.allCategoriesHint: Leave empty to include every category
widgetSettings.createListHint: First create a list from the /watch page.
widgetSettings.emptyHint: Empty — search and add below. Leaving it empty loads the default list.

widgetTray.fullHint: {{max}}/{{max}} filled — remove one to add more

lightweightChart.noInvestorCountData: No investor count data for this fund
lightweightChart.noPortfolioSizeData: No portfolio size data for this fund

errorBoundary.title: An error occurred while rendering this page

home.heroDescription: One portal for stocks, crypto, forex & metals — with institutional-grade charts, enterprise SSO, and zero config.

security.title: Bank-Grade Security
security.description: Keycloak SSO, LDAP federation, 2FA/TOTP — your credentials never touch our servers.

marketData.title: Live Market Data
marketData.description: Real-time quotes across stocks, crypto, forex & metals with sub-second latency.

charting.title: Advanced Charting
charting.description: TradingView charts with indicators, drawing tools, Fibonacci and compare mode.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Tracking
portfolio.description: Build portfolios, track P&L, and monitor positions across every asset class.

ctaSection.heading: Ready to trade smarter?
ctaSection.body: Join in seconds — no credit card, no commitment.

register.subtitle: Create your account
register.intro: Join Finance Portal and start managing your financial data securely.

login.intro: Sign in to access Finance Portal.

bankRates.emptyTitle: No bank rates found for this currency
bankRates.emptyHint: Check when the scheduler last ran

password.title: Password
password.hint: Click the link in your email to set a new password.
password.successDesc: Click the link in your inbox to change your password

emailMaster.title: Email master switch
emailMaster.hint: When off, email selections below are ignored.

notificationPreferences.footer: In-app notifications always run. Email requires the master switch to be on.

empty.adminHint: Use admin buttons to fetch data.

admin.candlesTitle: Refresh candle data (may take a while)
admin.candlesStarted: Candle update started (this may take a few minutes)

positions.emptyHint: Add lots from Crypto, Stock, Forex or Fund pages

onboarding.idleSubtitle: Define historical positions to track hypothetical portfolio performance.

derivatives.title: Derivative Positions
derivatives.emptyHint: Open positions from the VIOP page
derivatives.confirmDelete: This derivative position record will be deleted.
derivatives.dataUnavailable: No data on this date — nearest prior price will be used

marketAddPosition.noPortfolioHint: You need to create a portfolio first before adding positions.

positionDelete.title: Delete Position
positionDelete.confirmSuffix: position will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

marketOverview.title: Market Overview
marketOverview.revertTitle: Discard all changes in this session
marketOverview.editToggleDirty: Exit edit mode (unsaved changes will be lost)
marketOverview.emptyDragHint: Drag a widget from the gallery above

toast.rateLimitMessage: You sent too many requests. Please wait a moment.

error.networkError: Cannot reach the server. Please check your connection.
error.serverUnavailable: Server is currently unavailable. Please try again shortly.
error.gatewayTimeout: The server took too long to respond. Please try again.
error.serverError: An unexpected server error occurred. Please try again.

notificationPanel.title: Notifications
notificationPanel.broadcastTitle: Broadcast a system message to all users
notificationPanel.confirmClearMessage: {{count}} notifications will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

adminTrackedAssets.title: Tracked Assets Management
adminTrackedAssets.adminRequired: ADMIN role is required to view this page.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.sendMessageTitle: Send a message to this user

twoFactor.descActive: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. Use the options below to re-set up or disable.
twoFactor.descInactive: Protect your account with an extra layer using Google/Microsoft Authenticator.
twoFactor.footerActive: If you disable, single-factor sign-in is active and account security drops.
twoFactor.footerInactive: You will be redirected to the verification setup page.
twoFactor.redirectingHint: You will be taken to the authenticator setup page
twoFactor.disabledBody: Two-factor authentication has been removed from your account

confirm.title: Disable 2FA?
confirm.message: Your account will be protected by single-factor sign-in. This is reversible — you can set it up again any time.

error.title: {{label}} update failed
error.body: An error occurred during the operation

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: A finance dashboard combining market data, portfolio tracking and notifications in one interface.
onboarding.dismissHint: You won't see this window again — manage all options from Settings.

multiMarket.title: Multi Market
multiMarket.body: Stock, crypto, commodity, fund, forex, bond in one place

watchlistItemEdit.title: Edit asset settings
watchlistItemEdit.thresholdHint: Leave blank to use global default. 0 = every movement triggers a notification.

errors.quantityInteger: This asset requires a whole-number quantity

confirm.heading: Confirm your action?
confirm.subAdd: Lot will be added for {{code}}
confirm.subEdit: Lot will be updated for {{code}}

availability.has: Data available for this date: {{price}}
availability.none: No price data for this date — enter manually.

newsSourceAdmin.missingBody: Source name and URL are required
newsSourceAdmin.deletePromptBody: This news source will be permanently removed.

trackedAssetAdmin.heading: {{title}} tracked list ({{prefix}}{{count}})
trackedAssetAdmin.deletePromptBody: This asset will be removed from the tracked list. Existing market data (candles, snapshots) is preserved.

addPriceAlert.title: Price alert
addPriceAlert.subtitlePrompt: Pick an asset and set a threshold
addPriceAlert.errorThreshold: Threshold must be a valid number
addPriceAlert.errorReference: Percent alert requires a reference price

ABOVE.label: Crosses above
ABOVE.hint: Notify when price moves above the threshold

BELOW.label: Drops below
BELOW.hint: Notify when price drops below the threshold

CHANGE_PCT_UP.label: % rises
CHANGE_PCT_UP.hint: Notify when price rises by the given % from reference

CHANGE_PCT_DOWN.label: % drops
CHANGE_PCT_DOWN.hint: Notify when price drops by the given % from reference

addWatchlistItem.subtitlePrompt: Pick an asset, then add it to a list
addWatchlistItem.thresholdHint: Leave blank to use the global 5% threshold.
addWatchlistItem.duplicateWarn: {{code}} already exists in this list. Saving will overwrite its note and threshold.
addWatchlistItem.errorThreshold: % threshold must be a positive number

priceAlertEdit.title: Edit alert settings
priceAlertEdit.thresholdHint: TRY price for ABOVE/BELOW, percent value for % directions.

createWatchlist.title: New list
createWatchlist.subtitle: You can create up to 20 lists

emptyList.title: List is empty
emptyList.hint: Add a crypto, stock, forex or fund and track its movements here.

emptyAlerts.title: No alerts yet
emptyAlerts.hint: Set ABOVE/BELOW or percent-change alerts on any asset.

deleteListConfirm.title: Delete list?
deleteListConfirm.message: "{{name}}" and all assets inside will be permanently deleted.
